```{=html}
<!-- recode_values() - with lookup table -->
<script>
window.RVL_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '4750'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '5000']
];
window.RVL_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// Lookup table
window.RVL_LOOKUP = [
  ['Biscoe', 'Southwest'],
  ['Dream', 'Northwest'],
  ['Torgersen', 'Northwest']
];
// Which rows match which lookup entry
window.RVL_MATCHES = [
  [true, false, false, true],    // Biscoe
  [false, true, false, false],   // Dream
  [false, false, true, false]    // Torgersen
];
window.RVL_LOOKUP_COLORS = ['#e8853a', '#4a86c5', '#9b59b6'];
</script>
```

::: {.rvl-stage-wrap}
<div id="rvl-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .rvl-frag id="rvl-lookup-1"}
[]{.fragment .rvl-frag id="rvl-lookup-2"}
[]{.fragment .rvl-frag id="rvl-lookup-3"}
[]{.fragment .rvl-frag id="rvl-result"}
[]{.fragment .rvl-frag id="rvl-highlight-new"}
